## Description
Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Types check (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changes
- [ ] Updated documentation if needed
- [ ] Follows conventional commit format
